Nadimi Wines, Georgia

NADIMI WINE

From the Georgian Nadimi — meaning symposium: the ancient art of gathering together over wine, song, and conversation. Our wines carry that spirit in every bottle.

Discover Our Wines
ნადიმი
Batumi · Georgia
Our Story

A wine born from the spirit of gathering

NADIMI is the house wine of Restaurant Symposium, in the vibrant seaside city of Batumi, Georgia. The brand was created to embody the ancient ritual of the symposium — the Greek and Georgian tradition of coming together over food, wine, and meaningful conversation.

Designed with an illustrated identity that bridges ancient culture and contemporary craft, each label tells the story of a place, a moment, and a toast shared among friends.

8000Years of Georgian wine
3Signature wines
1City by the sea
The Collection

Wines of Georgia

Three expressions of ancient Georgian grape varieties, crafted for the modern table.

Our flagship red wine, skin-contact fermented in barrels. Georgia's most celebrated red grape Saperavi delivers a wine of stunning complexity and depth.

Red · Oak Aged

Saperavi

საფერავი

Georgia's great red grape — ink-dark, full-bodied, with remarkable depth. Aged 18 months in Georgian oak, it is powerful yet deeply civilised.

Symposium
The symposium was not merely a meal — it was a philosophy of living. To drink, to speak, to listen, and to remember.

Nadimi · The Georgian Art of Gathering

The Place

Born in Batumi, on the shore of the Black Sea

Batumi is a city of contrasts — ancient and modern, European and Caucasian, mountainous and maritime. It is here, among the palms and the cobblestones, that NADIMI found its voice.

🌊

Black Sea Coast

The humid, subtropical climate of Adjara shapes a unique terroir — wild, intense, and unlike anywhere else in Georgia.

🏛️

Ancient Culture

Georgia is home to one of the world's oldest wine cultures — 8,000 years of unbroken tradition, from qvevri clay jars to the modern glass.

🍇

Native Varieties

Over 500 indigenous grape varieties grow in Georgia. NADIMI celebrates the finest of them with honesty and craft.

Our Home

Restaurant Symposium

NADIMI was created exclusively for Restaurant Symposium — a dining destination in Batumi where the philosophy of the ancient Greek and Georgian feast is very much alive. The restaurant's name and the wine's name share the same soul: the joy of the table, shared among friends.

Reserve a Table →
Find Us

Come to the table

Whether you're visiting Batumi or a longtime local, Restaurant Symposium welcomes you to experience NADIMI wines as they were meant — in good company.
